meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn how to implement automated user onboarding to streamline your dev workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: When you can't debug code, you're likely missing the context of how the user interacts with your system. By building a robust onboarding flow, you force your application to expose its internal state and error patterns early, turning ambiguous crashes into actionable, user-driven diagnostic logs that simplify your debugging lifecycle.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank screen at 2 AM. The client’s production environment is throwing a cryptic 500 error, and your terminal is a graveyard of stack traces that lead nowhere. You aren't just fighting code; you're fighting the invisible wall between your logic and the user's erratic reality.

But what if your application could tell you exactly where it broke? By implementing a rigorous user onboarding flow, you effectively instrument your app to capture critical user state before they even hit the main dashboard. This isn't just about 'welcoming' users; it's about building a telemetry-rich bridge that turns every failure into a clear, debuggable path.

steps.title: Define User State Schema
steps.description: Establish a clear data model that tracks the user journey from signup to the first interaction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a JSON schema for a user onboarding state machine that tracks progress through 5 key steps, including timestamps and error hooks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'create user_onboarding_schema.json with state tracking'

steps.title: Instrument Onboarding Flows
steps.description: Inject logging hooks into your onboarding flow to catch failures in real-time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the onboarding component to wrap async actions in a try-catch block that logs user state to an external monitoring service.
steps.claude_code_command: claude fix --file onboarding_service.ts --pattern 'add error telemetry to all async functions'

steps.title: Implement Contextual Debugging UI
steps.description: Create a hidden debug view that renders the current user onboarding state for easier troubleshooting.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React debug overlay component that displays the current onboarding state object and a 'Reset' button.

steps.title: Simulate Failure Paths
steps.description: Use automated tests to ensure your onboarding handles edge cases without crashing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Jest unit tests for the onboarding flow that simulate network timeouts and invalid user inputs.

steps.title: Automate Error Reporting
steps.description: Pipe onboarding errors directly to your communication channel.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service that sends a formatted Slack alert whenever a user onboarding step fails, including the full state context.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'setup slack error notification service for onboarding failures'

pro_tips: Always log the user's browser agent and viewport size in your onboarding telemetry; 80% of 'unsolvable' bugs are layout-specific.
Use a 'Feature Flag' to toggle your debug overlay in production so you can diagnose client issues live without redeploying.
Never rely on global error handlers alone; granular error boundaries in onboarding components provide 10x more context.
Attach a unique 'Session ID' to every onboarding attempt to correlate backend logs with frontend user actions instantly.
If you can't reproduce a bug, use Claude Code to auto-generate a mock data set based on the last 5 logs of the failed onboarding session.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is instrumented, integrate a session replay tool to watch how users interact with your newly stabilized interface.
content.conversion_block: Stop chasing ghosts in your codebase. Start shipping reliable, self-documenting features that make your clients wonder how you became so fast. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
